data.body: LANDED: all 11 stacked Gerrit changes (356-366, topic cite-stone-sea) passed both gates (LLM-Review +1 PASS + Verified +1 CI) and were SUBMITTED atomically to main (submitting the tip 366 merged all ancestors). main is now at 3fc0a827b with WS1..WS10 (e638d623e..3fc0a827b), replicating to the GitHub mirror. The DSO plan-review gap adoption epic is fully delivered + landed.
